author: RamSet
releaseNotes: v1.4.2 - Fixes a fresh-install crash (driver used an app-only call), surfaces warnings at the info log level, and removes a stray undeclared-attribute event. Monitors Internet/LAN/optional custom host over HTTP with a manual check command.

drivers.name: Network Monitor HealthCheck (HTTP)
drivers.description: Simple network health check driver to monitor device availability using ping and report status.
